title: grumilea malayana
intro: Grumilea malayana is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Malay grumilea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Grumilea malayana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it a sought-after remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Grumilea malayana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, allowing for a concentrated extract to be used in medicinal applications.
